title: Fire Sparrow Clan
content:
Fire Sparrow Clan
 is one of the nine 
High Ancient Clans
 of the 
Outer Realm
. Their bloodline is that of a counterfeit Black Vermillion Bird. Their clan is based on a flaming star-field similar to the 
Vermillion Bird Divine Sect
.

Background
[
]

In the past, they trapped the cultivators of the 
Sealed Realm
 inside the 
Realm-Sealing Formation
 and slaughtered them like dogs.

Their origin is from the Vermillion Bird Divine Sect.

History
[
]

A member of the Fire Sparrow Clan entered the Seven-Colored Realm during the time Wang Lin was there.

He attempted to steal Wang Lin's Vermillion Bird mark but was instead killed by him. Wang Lin then took away the Fire Sparrow Clan's ability to manipulate fire. Although this did not take away their entire abilities, it still significantly weakened the clan as three of their nine Black Vermillion Bird statues collapsed while the rest were severely damaged.

Wang Lin also absorbed the Fire Sparrow Clan member's Flame mark which, along with the feather of Vermillion Bird he got from 
Wu Qing
, allowed him to achieve the unprecedented third-awakening of his Vermillion Bird.
